query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "mobileforge: annotation-free adaptation for mobile gui agents with hie" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (d) and (e) as it presents a foundational mobile GUI agent framework with a scalable data pipeline and reinforcement fine-tuning, which constitutes the canonical prior work and empirical baseline for extending or comparing against "MobileForge" in the domain of annotation-free mobile GUI adaptation.
